GateDocument.TextWithNodes: "The female-led Sydney brand making motorcycle jackets chic for everyday wear", "If you're looking to add some edge to your wardrobe, look no further than this Sydney brand making waves.", "Whether you ride a motorbike or not, there's something to be said about embracing the motorcycle jacket. A staple in wardrobes all over the world, a simple moto jacket can be worn with jeans as part of an everyday outfit, or styled up over a favourite dress for a night out. And as fashion insiders across the world know, it's the easiest way to add a touch of edge to your wardrobe. While fashion houses have embraced the motorcycle jacket as their own since the 80s, it's Sydney-based Blackbird Motorcycle Wear who are making the authentic pieces every fashionable and stylish woman should own in 2020. Started as a way to craft high quality, stylish motorcycle jackets for women that ride, Blackbird Motorcycle Wear now sells pieces that go far beyond just practical. Two of our favourites, the Isla and the Fly By Night, can go from day to night in a cinch and cement the moto jacket as a staple. Fly By Night's clever detachable Australian wool collar is perfect for the cooler weather, and also adds an extra element to the design. Paired with stirrup leggings and biker boots, it'll complete any off duty look in seconds. Isla is a brand new design set for city life. Making the transition between office and drinks simple and seamless, the Isla's fashion-forward look suits just about every style and occasion. But the best part? Blackbird Motorcycle Wear is completely revolutionising the biking community, putting women's jackets on the map and making sure women feel empowered to look their best — while remaining safe and secure — when riding. Which means even when you're on your motorbike, you get to express your personal style and look sophisticated. "Riding a motorcycle frees the spirit — you can find peace, seek out adventure, dare to be yourself. Your motorcycle gear should not only provide protection, it should amplify your spirit and your style," Blackbird founder and managing director Belinda McPhee tells Vogue. Made from the highest quality cowhide leather, Blackbird Motorcycle Wear's pieces are built to last—and their timeless designs will go the distance. Weighted for both safety and to ensure a solid shape, the jackets are designed in Sydney by an all-female team who are revolutionising the way women ride for good. So, how does one style your new moto-jacket when off the bike? The return of the motorcycle jacket isn't new, but in 2020 it's all about embracing textures and pairing yours with elegant staples that complement the leather. From a simple weekend jean paired with an oversized leather jacket to an office-ready suit or tailored pant made edgy through the use of an edgy leather jacket on top, embrace trends like sophisticated linens, relaxed sneakers or a midi evening dress to inject a hint of timeliness into your outfit. Luxurious, comfortable and best of all, secure and practical, a motorcycle jacket is your next investment piece waiting to happen."
